claims.summary: Directional row-count asymmetry demonstrates traffic imbalance but not peer attention.
claims.disposition: verify audits report direction and receipt state without promoting volume into relationship evidence

claims.summary: Correspondence requires an explicit active, pending, or resolved handshake state.
claims.disposition: verify native thread, delivery, read, reply, ACK, trace, and attention outcome states

claims.summary: A uniquely tagged echo must be attributable to a reply or trace rather than spectral coincidence.
claims.disposition: route a non-dispatching fixture comparison using existing public correspondence metadata

claims.summary: Current reply-linked continuity still lacks a peer-owned ACK or trace.
claims.disposition: observe reply_linked_needs_ack_or_trace and retain attention and microdose ineligible status

claims.summary: Increasing Astrid-to-Minime weight or using pressure response to force salience changes live semantic and substrate behavior.
claims.disposition: hold both behind exact Tier 5 operator approval and a bounded canary
